notes: AI-authored documentation-only modernization on a scoped review branch. pipeline_specs/README.md was upgraded in place to v0.4, reordered to the required root-README contract, and reconciled to current executable-pipeline, compatibility, test, receipt, workflow, correction, and rollback evidence.
